name: IRC_SEARCH_QUEUE
description: This table is used to index search documents for candidate,requisition and geography entities.

columns.Name: SEARCH_QUEUE_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of this table generated by sequence IRC_SEARCH_QUEUE_S

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: AFFECTED_ENTITY_ID
columns.Comments: Primary key of entities TCA Geographies,Requisition and Candidates inserted in this table for indexing

columns.Name: REFERENCE_COUNT
columns.Comments: Value of this column shows that row is already being picked up by a thead for indexing , so that no other threads pick up the row again for indexing.

columns.Name: INDEXING_CODE
columns.Comments: This code tells whether the entity is to be processed in full indexing or incremental indexing

columns.Name: ENTITY_TYPE_CODE
columns.Comments: This value shows the type of entity to be indexed - Location,candidate or Requision

columns.Name: PROCESSOR_ID
columns.Comments: Thread Id of the thread which is going to index this particualr entity row

columns.Name: PROCESS_ON_DATE
columns.Comments: Start Date of a Candidate after offer acceptance

columns.Name: UPDATE_TYPE
columns.Comments: Type of update in the entity to perform

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
